'''Vigrriev''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Elom/Legends|Elom]] thug and enforcer for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. Stationed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], Vigrriev often traveled offworld at the request of [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]], [[Revidjasa]] or [[Llleag'Mak]].
